title: xali's Potions Backported
description: Backport of the popular resource pack xali's Potions to version 1.12.2
body:
**Backport of the popular resource pack xali's Potions to version 1.12.2**

This resource pack changes the textures of all potions to new, unique textures for each individual potion.

![A little preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2daec1eda648e76657d9bd2ab89a423faaecbb24.png)

Original resource pack: [xali's Potions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-potion)
